pillars.title: Precision Training
pillars.body: World-class sidemount instruction from a RAID Tech Trimix Sidemount Instructor and founder of the AXIS Method.

pillars.title: Balanced Configuration
pillars.body: Sidemount done right means perfect neutral static stability. Learn to set up your kit the way technical diving demands.

pillars.title: Gear Intelligence
pillars.body: Real-world gear reviews from thousands of hours underwater. No sponsored fluff — just what works at depth.

photo_band.quote: Sidemount is not a configuration — it's a discipline and an art!

currently.heading: Stateside. Building. Diving Deeper.
currently.body: After four years running Prana Dive in Bali, I moved back to the U.S. on June 1, 2026 to become Brand and Customer Experience Manager at Deep 6 Expedition Gear. I'm also working toward full cave certification in Florida cave country — and applying the same AXIS Method logic I teach in sidemount to gear, business, and every other system that's gotten more complicated than it needs to be.

cta.heading: Ready to dive deeper?
cta.body: Explore training courses or get in touch to discuss your goals.
